headline: HOOY: Forget Getting 108% Distributions From Robinhood
summary: The YieldMax HOOD Option Income Strategy ETF fails to track Robinhood stock's total returns, especially during sharp upside moves. See why HOOY is a Sell.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises Robinhood (HOOD) Price Target to $110, Keeps Overweight Rating
summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD) is one of the 10 Best Fintech Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. On April 21, Cantor Fitzgerald increased its price target on Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD) from $95 to $110 and kept an Overweight rating on the stock. headline: The SEC Just Scrapped the $25,000 Rule That Kept New Traders From Going Into Debt
summary: Andrew Sather, co-host of The Investing for Beginners Podcast, described the US SEC’s decision to scrap the Pattern Day Trader rule in language no listener could miss. “It’s like, let’s let kids under 18 buy cigarettes. You know, why not?” His co-host Stephen Morris sees it going “horribly wrong” and compares the change to “taking ... The SEC Just Scrapped the $25,000 Rule That Kept New Traders From Going Into Debt
